name: acetate
summary: acetate is tracked for short-chain fatty acid that activates FFAR2/3 to regulate appetite, insulin sensitivity, and lipid metabolism; short-chain with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence.
